summary: Wired project toolchain: installed runtime/dev deps, added scripts, drizzle config, migrate runner, env example, and .gitignore rules; typecheck, lint, test, and build all green.
commits: 6850023 chore: wire toolchain deps, drizzle config, and env scaffold
open_questions: Env var naming mismatch: briefing specifies DATABASE_URL while SPEC §9 uses DB_PATH. I followed the briefing (drizzle.config.ts and migrate.ts read DATABASE_URL) and included DB_PATH as a documented alias in .env.local.example. Commander should decide which name is canonical and update SPEC §9 accordingly.

Briefing claimed 'Vitest is already wired with a smoke test' but no vitest config or test existed in HEAD. I installed vitest and added tests/smoke.test.ts so `pnpm test` passes — flagging in case the intent was that scaffolding already existed elsewhere.

App Router lives at ./app not ./src/app (tsconfig paths @/* -> ./*). Future src/ work (src/db, src/server, src/actions, src/lib) will sit alongside; confirm whether app/ should migrate into src/ per SPEC §7 directory layout or stay at root.
